user.title: Tylo Sauna
user.description: Select your Tylo Elite controller discovered on the network, or add it manually.

confirm.title: Configure Tylo Sauna
confirm.description: If you enable “Allow telemetry from other IPs”, Home Assistant will accept telemetry even if it comes from a different IP than the one you configured. This is useful for multi-node setups (sauna + steam) and firmwares that send telemetry from another address.

error.device_not_found: Selected device is no longer available. Please try again.
error.invalid_host: Please enter a valid IP address or hostname.
error.invalid_port: Please enter a valid UDP port (1-65535).

init.title: Tylo Sauna options
init.description: Change connection settings. Use “Allow telemetry from other IPs” if telemetry is sent from another node/IP (common for sauna + steam systems).

data.name: Name
data.experimental_aroma: Experimental: enable steam aroma controls (Eucalyptus test)
